resolved_this_pass.truth_boundary: Retrieved regions were classified, deduplicated and quarantined where unsafe; raw-byte hashing, original file boundaries and whole-file denominator completeness remain unavailable.
The progress endpoint is changed to resolve the highest numbered reconciliation tracker instead of hard-coding v3.

new_findings.summary: The source contains incompatible module counts and completion certificates, encoding corruption, mock/simulated behavior and unsafe unlimited-authority language.
n8n orchestration, scoped instruction management, knowledge/research services and database interfaces were retained as governed candidates, not runtime claims.

next_executable_tasks: Run CI for bounded source ingestion and latest-tracker selection.
Merge only after exact-head checks pass.
Continue repository-local hardening and candidate requirement mapping.
Reconcile external gates only when new evidence is available.
completion_assertion: The bounded folder0 pass advances source coverage but does not establish full historical, runtime or production completion.
